summary: Impersonation/Preview feature bug fix verified - All features working correctly. Admin can impersonate cashier, Dashboard correctly shows only cashier-allowed quick actions (pos, tables, orders), impersonation banner appears on both Dashboard and POS pages, exit impersonation restores admin user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Impersonation feature fully tested. Key localStorage keys: cached_user (for user state), original_token (for admin->employee impersonation), original_super_admin_token (for super admin->tenant impersonation). Dashboard filteredActions correctly filters based on user.role and user.permissions.

backend_tests.test_01_admin_login: PASSED - Admin login works with full permissions
backend_tests.test_02_impersonate_cashier_api: PASSED - POST /auth/impersonate/{user_id} returns cashier role and permissions
backend_tests.test_03_impersonated_user_has_correct_pe: PASSED - Cashier has limited permissions (pos, tables, orders)
backend_tests.test_04_impersonated_token_works: PASSED - Impersonated token can be used for API calls

frontend_tests.impersonation_banner_on_pos: PASSED - Banner shows 'You are in preview mode as Test Cashier'
frontend_tests.cashier_quick_actions_filtered: PASSED - Only 3 actions visible (pos, tables, orders)
frontend_tests.admin_actions_hidden: PASSED - All 18 admin-only actions hidden for cashier
frontend_tests.exit_impersonation_button: PASSED - 'Return to my account' button works
